title: All Who Believe and Are Baptized
abc_source:

T: All Who Believe and Are Baptized
%%combinevoices 1
T: (also known as He That Believes and Is Baptized)
C: Words: Thomas Hansen Kingo, 1689.  Translation by George Alfred Taylor Rygh, 1909, alt.

C: Setting: "Mehrstimmiges ChoralBuch", 1906.

S: Music source: "Mehrstimmiges ChoralBuch", 1906 Hymn #206, page 162 Ed. Karl Brauer. Translation found in The Lutheran Hymnary, 1913.

metadata.lyricist: Thomas Hansen Kingo, 1689.  Translation by George Alfred Taylor Rygh, 1909, alt

c_lines: Words: Thomas Hansen Kingo, 1689.  Translation by George Alfred Taylor Rygh, 1909, alt.
Music: 'Es ist das Heil uns Kommen Her' German circa 1400 from Etlich Christlich Lider, Wittenberg, 1524.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2011 Revision.

1.raw_text: All who believe and are baptized shall see the Lord's salvation; baptized into the death of Christ, they are a new crea- tion. through Christ's redemption they shall stand among the glorious heav'nly band of every tribe and nation.

2.raw_text: With one accord, O God, we pray: grant us thy Holy Spirit; look thou on our infirmity through Jesus' blood and merit. Grant us to grow in grace each day that by this sacrament we may eternal life inherit.
